form.formComment: Comes off a (22.18) win last time, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a Grade 5 over 375m at this track. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 375m. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 375m at this track behind Skedaddle Benny beaten 5 lengths (22.51). Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.
